2606.08245.title: ZAS-SQL: Distilling Rules from Failures for Zero-Shot Text-to-SQL
2606.08245.paper_summary: Text-to-SQL translates natural language into executable SQL queries. Few-shot in-context learning methods built upon large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance, yet their reliance on demonstrations limits cross-domain generalization and consumes substantial context window space. Existing zero-shot methods, lacking effective generation constraints, still fall short of few-shot approaches. We observe that LLM failures in zero-shot Text-to-SQL are not random but exhibit systematic, recurring patterns. Building on this observation, we propose a fully zero-shot Text-to-SQL framework that distills core generation rules from failure cases through a Map-Reduce-based rule distillation pipeline and improves generation quality via three complementary modules: knowledge-augmented schema representation, which supplements missing semantics in Data Definition Language; a rule-driven structured reasoning framework that suppresses structural deviations; and Execution-Guided Early Stopping, which enables low-cost self-correction. On Spider, the proposed framework achieves up to 87.2% and 88.6% execution accuracy on the Dev and Test sets, respectively, establishing a new zero-shot state-of-the-art and surpassing multiple few-shot and fine-tuning methods built upon GPT-4/4o. On the domain-specific dataset UrbanPlan, it achieves 81.3%, confirming that the rule distillation approach generalizes across domains. Moreover, when equipped with a 4B-parameter model, the framework surpasses zero-shot baselines of leading closed-source models, demonstrating strong model generality.
2606.08245.paper_summary_zh: 文本到 SQL 將自然語言轉換為可執行的 SQL 查詢。基於大型語言模型 (LLMs) 的少量示例上下文學習方法表現出色，但它們對示範的依賴限制了跨領域的泛化，並消耗了大量的上下文窗口空間。現有的零-shot 方法缺乏有效的生成約束，仍然不及少量示例的方法。我們觀察到 LLM 在零-shot 文本到 SQL 中的失敗並非隨機，而是顯示出系統性的、重複的模式。基於這一觀察，我們提出了一個完全的零-shot 文本到 SQL 框架，通過基於 Map-Reduce 的規則提煉管道從失敗案例中提煉核心生成規則，並通過三個互補模塊提高生成質量：知識增強的模式表示，補充數據定義語言中的缺失語義；一個驅動規則的結構推理框架，抑制結構偏差；以及執行引導的早期停止，實現低成本的自我修正。在 Spider 上，所提出的框架在開發集和測試集上分別達到 87.2% 和 88.6% 的執行準確率，樹立了新的零-shot 最佳紀錄，超越了多種基於 GPT-4/4o 的少量示例和微調方法。在特定領域數據集 UrbanPlan 上，它達到 81.3%，證實了規則提煉方法在不同領域之間的泛化。此外，當配備 4B 參數模型時，該框架超越了領先的封閉源模型的零-shot 基準，顯示出強大的模型泛化能力。
2606.08245.author: Hongzhou Zheng et.al.
2606.08245.authors: Hongzhou Zheng, Yixin Gou, Wenjia Zhang
